sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30019" key="e)gguhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγγυ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n30019.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">connected with suretyship</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πράγματα, πρόσωπα</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.28</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
